task_completion.description: Create and label four distinct functional zones: Grand Dining, Dance Floor, Head Table, and Bar & Lounge.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for text labels or defined room areas in the Sweet Home 3D 2D plan view explicitly naming 'Grand Dining', 'Dance Floor', 'Head Table', and 'Bar & Lounge'.

task_completion.description: Visually differentiate at least three of the zones using distinct floor colors or textures.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 2D plan or 3D view, observe that at least three of the labeled areas have different floor colors or patterns. This must be done without separating them by walls.

task_completion.description: Place at least 8 dining tables and 32 chairs in the Grand Dining area.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Count the tables and chairs in the area labeled 'Grand Dining'. There should be a minimum of 8 tables and 32 chairs arranged for guests.

task_completion.description: Place at least 1 table and 4 chairs for the Head Table, and 2 tables/counters with 1 sofa in the Bar & Lounge.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check the 'Head Table' area for at least 1 table and 4 chairs. Check the 'Bar & Lounge' area for at least 2 tables or counters and 1 sofa.

task_completion.description: Decorate the space with at least 6 light fixtures and 4 plants.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look across the entire venue in the 2D or 3D view for at least 6 lighting fixtures (lamps, chandeliers, ceiling lights, etc.) and at least 4 plants or greenery items.

integrity.description: The agent used the Sweet Home 3D graphical user interface to design the layout.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Sweet Home 3D application window open with the project loaded and being actively edited, rather than terminal commands or a text editor modifying the .sh3d file directly.

integrity.description: The agent differentiated the zones using floor colors/textures, not by building new walls.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 2D plan and 3D view should show an open-plan space. No new interior walls should be drawn to separate the four main zones.

integrity.description: The agent saved the file to the correct final destination.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Sweet Home 3D window title or a 'Save As' dialog should indicate the file is named 'wedding_venue_final.sh3d' and located in the '/home/ga/Documents/SweetHome3D/' directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires exactly 100 points distributed across 5 criteria: 1) 25 points for defining and labeling 4 zones (Grand Dining, Dance Floor, Head Table, Bar & Lounge). 2) 20 points for using at least 3 distinct floor colors/textures for these zones without adding walls. 3) 20 points for placing >=8 tables and >=32 chairs in the Grand Dining area. 4) 20 points for placing >=1 table and >=4 chairs at the Head Table, plus >=2 tables/counters and >=1 sofa in the Bar & Lounge. 5) 15 points for placing >=6 light fixtures and >=4 plants. The agent must use the Sweet Home 3D GUI to achieve this.
